_format._note: Ignored by the app (song.html / index.html only read "songs" and "concerts"). Quick reference for editors; see README.md for details.

song fields.title: display name (required)
song fields.audio: audio file URL — use this OR "videoId"
song fields.loops: [{ start, end, label?, score? }] — times as M:SS or M:SS.s
song fields.fineTune: true to show 0.1s nudge buttons on loop times
song fields.scales: { root: note, items: [{ mode, label? }] } to show scale-playback buttons; mode is e.g. ionian/dorian/aeolian
song fields.drone: note name to enable a drone, e.g. "A♭" or "Eb3" (octave optional, defaults to 3); omit or null = off
song fields.speedMin: minimum value for the speed slider
song fields.footer: HTML note shown below the controls
